name: Mios
description: This bone-forged sword includes a tendon-whip to distract and maim the enemy.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: This bone-forged sword includes a tendon-whip to distract and maim the enemy.

components.name: Forma
components.description: This shape-altering component is fundamental to Orokin construction. Allows you to change the polarity of a mod slot on a Warframe, Companions or Weapon and then resets their affinity to Unranked. This can only be used on max Rank Warframes, Companions and Weapons.

components.name: Mutagen Mass
components.description:
This living mass can produce weaponized toxins for weaponry.

Location: Clan Research (Bio Lab in the Dojo) and Infested Outbreak Invasion Rewards

components.name: Nano Spores
components.description:
Fibrous technocyte tumour. Handle Infested tissue with caution.

Location: Saturn, Neptune, Eris, and Deimos

components.name: Plastids
components.description:
A disgusting nanite-infested tissue mass.

Location: Phobos, Saturn, Uranus, Pluto, and Eris

patchlogs.name: The Sacrifice: Update 23.2.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed numerous missing Whip (Mios, Lacera, etc) animations as reported here: https://forums.warframe.com/topic/989160-weapon-blade-and-whip-weapons-are-currently-broken-reduced-range-on-the-whip-sections-known/

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.8.2
patchlogs.fixes:
•    Fixed the Mios and Lacera whip going invisible when meleeing immediately after switching weapons.
•    Fixed the Mios and Lacera whip spazzing around erratically when switching weapons after performing a Quick Melee attack.

patchlogs.name: Update 18: The Second Dream
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed the whip portion of the Mios sometimes not being visible during finisher animations.
Fixed the Mios’ whip disappearing from players who are revived from bleedout state, showing only a sword in their hand.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.11.0 + 17.11.0.1
patchlogs.fixes:
The Mios Has Arrived!
Designed by community member RedSkittlez, the Mios is a bone-forged sword that includes a tendon-whip to distract and maim the enemy.
Add the Mios to your Arsenal by visiting the Market or Clan Research today!
